content:
**👋 Welcome, New Volunteers!**


Joining the server, participating in discussions, reporting translation errors, and contributing to the GitHub translation repo **does not require an NDA.**
*(please note: you cannot share screenshots of discussions here outside of the server.)*

However, accessing the google drive folder that contains the full game source sheet (140k+ lines) **does require you to sign the NDA**.

**🔒 NDA Sign-Up Process:**

Please watch for a DocuSign email from us with your NDA invite.

Carefully read this guide before signing the Volunteer Project's NDA through Docusign:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ygsRTJkVeivPaXvOvfxjlnODC94uXJMjSkWmiasz48Y/edit?usp=sharing

📋 Lastly, please check if you're on the NDA list below. 
If your name is missing and you haven't signed yet, please let us know!

embeds.title: Morimens Volunteer NDA Docusign Guide
embeds.description: Morimens Volunteer NDA Docusign Guide  This document will guide you through how to sign the NDA agreement via Docusign.  STEP 1:  Find the Docusign E-mail. If you don’t find it, please check your Updates or Spam folder.   STEP 2:  Click on “REVIEW DOCUMENT”.  STEP 3: Click on Signature in the up...
